name: metro-tracker-root
description: Delhi Metro Tracker PWA — MERN monorepo

scripts.android:run: cd frontend && npx cap run android --target=Pixel_5
scripts.ios:run: cd frontend && npx cap run ios
scripts.app:android: cd frontend && npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap run android --target=Pixel_5
scripts.app:ios: cd frontend && npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap run ios
scripts.start:prod: npm run build:frontend && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env production

author: Metro Tracker
